name: plan-plus
description: Optimizes Claude Code plan mode: on ExitPlanMode the full plan is copied to a plan-docs folder (plan-full.md) alongside a reference-docs/ folder, and the on-disk plan file is rewritten as a compressed line-reference index (each `## ` / `### ` header annotated with its (N-M) line range in the copy). An optional reused-session executor agent is available for steps that make sense to run out-of-context, but is not required — steps can be executed directly in the main conversation.
